title: Find K Pairs With Smallest Sums
hints: Notice that since both arrays are sorted, the smallest sum always involves nums1[0] and nums2[0].
Use a min-heap to explore pairs in increasing order of sum, starting with the pair (0,0).
When popping (i,j) from the heap, add (i+1,j) and (i,j+1) as candidates, using a set to avoid duplicates.
